decisions: Introduce YOLO + SAM3 combo for grounding (replace Qwen VLM grounding path)
Upgrade object assets to higher fidelity meshes
Proceed autonomously while CEO away; CEO returns to review

removed_modules: perception/vlm_qwen.py (grounding path dropped; describe/visual_query via vlm_go2 stays)
new_dependencies: open3d (pointcloud ops; may fall back to numpy)

history.details: v2.3 SDD artifacts archived to .sdd/archive-v2.3/. 2 bookkeeping commits pushed to remote.
v2.4 perception overhaul initiated. CEO directed YOLO+SAM3 grounding + high-fidelity assets; CEO away 2-3h, dispatcher drafting spec/plan autonomously.

spec.md drafted — 4 new perception modules, 6 modifications, 1 removal (QwenVLMDetector grounding), GSO scene swap. 11 MUST + 7 SHOULD + 4 MAY goals. 8 open questions for CEO resolution (O3 SAM3 vs SAM2.1, O4 object count, O6 Qwen retention prioritised).

plan.md drafted — 14 technical decisions, 11 module designs, SAM3/YOLOE both via ultralytics >=8.3.237 (single dep), SAM2.1 auto-fallback when sam3.pt missing (HF gate), numpy+scipy pointcloud (no hard open3d), Git-LFS for GSO meshes with script fallback, colour-fraction mask filter for 'blue bottle' subquery disambiguation. 10 risks tabulated. 10-task/6-wave execution sketch. Env probe: torch 2.11+cpu (CPU-only interpreter), ultralytics absent (needs pip add to [perception] extras), open3d + opencv + scipy already in deps.
